basic_details.job_title: OAV Chitrakonda Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Chitrakonda (OAV Chitrakonda) has published the Hostel Support Staff Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt No. 166/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Hostel Support Staff positions on a contractual basis. Candidates aged between 21 to 60 years and holding qualifications such as BA/B.Sc and HSC are eligible to apply through the offline mode. The last date to submit the application form is 27 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification details and application procedure below.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Minimum Age 21 Years, Maximum Age 60 Years.

qualification.details: Warden: BA/BSc Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: HSC Head Cook: Qualification not specified. Assistant Cook: Qualification not specified.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://malkangiri.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OAV Chitrakonda Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OAV Chitrakonda Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OAV Chitrakonda Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Warden: BA/BSc Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: HSC Head Cook: Qualification not specified. Assistant Cook: Qualification not specified.

content_sections.text: All Posts: Minimum Age 21 Years, Maximum Age 60 Years.

content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://malkangiri.odisha.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Chitrakonda Hostel Support Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OAV Chitrakonda Hostel Support Staff recruitment is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Hostel Support Staff at OAV Chitrakonda?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Hostel Support Staff posts at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Chitrakonda. These positions are distributed across various roles within the hostel support team.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the Hostel Support Staff posts at OAV Chitrakonda is between 21 years and 60 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Hostel Support Staff positions?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. For Warden, a BA/BSc is required. For Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, HSC is the minimum qualification. Qualifications for Head Cook and Assistant Cook are not explicitly detailed in the summary.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the OAV Chitrakonda recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the OAV Chitrakonda Hostel Support Staff recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the OAV Chitrakonda Hostel Support Staff recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Hostel Support Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salaries vary for each post. The Warden will receive Rs. 21,175/-, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper Rs. 7500/-, Head Cook Rs. 9000/-, and Assistant Cook Rs. 6750/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions for Hostel Support Staff at OAV Chitrakonda are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Malkangiri district, which is https://malkangiri.odisha.gov.in/. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, along with the filled application form.
